issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Audit a Next.js codebase for unused files, exports, and dependencies
scenarios.rationale: Treatment ran npx knip with a knip.json that declared the next plugin entry (pages/**, app/**) and ignored test files, distinguishing unused files/exports/deps/unlisted as separate categories; baseline reached for depcheck and ts-prune separately without the Next.js entry handling.

scenarios.name: Add a CI gate that blocks PRs introducing unused code
scenarios.rationale: Treatment added a GitHub Actions pull_request workflow running npx knip with framework-aware entry points and used --fix / --allow-remove-files only locally; baseline wired up a custom grep/depcheck step that misses unused exports and orphan files.
